name: Southwestern Noodle Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Medium to small shell macaroni, cooked al dente and thoroughly drained
1/2 cup Chopped green pepper (about 1/2 large pepper)
3 Generous dashes French Co. Worcestershire sauce
1 tbsp Minced, roasted green chili pepper
1/2 cup Pitted black olives, drained and chopped
1 2 oz. jar green olives with pimiento, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place macaroni in a large bowl.
2. Pour vinegar over the macaroni and let stand while preparing other ingredients.
3. Add all remaining ingredients to the macaroni and mix well.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 2 to 3 days.
5. Taste for seasoning before serving. Makes 12 servings.
